title: malvastrum lindheimerianum
intro: Malvastrum lindheimerianum, also known as Lindheimer's malvastrum or desert hollyhock, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malvastrum lindheimerianum include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
